responsibilities1: Research & Strategy: Research and evaluate emerging technologies to drive product innovation and optimize factory operations.

Full-Cycle Development: Lead the end-to-end development of web and mobile applications, including requirement analysis, database schema design, frontend/backend development, and technical documentation.
IoT Solutions: Design and implement IoT systems to enhance industrial automation and develop new commercial IoT products.
Full-Stack Engineering: Build and maintain scalable full-stack applications using React, Laravel, and MySQL to streamline internal business processes.
System Optimization: Analyze system logs and performance metrics to troubleshoot root causes and implement high-efficiency technical solutions.
Cloud & Infrastructure: Manage end-to-end deployment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and on-premise servers, ensuring robust security and system uptime.
responsibilities2: Requirement Gathering & Analysis: Actively engaged with clients to identify business needs and translate them into functional website requirements.
Web Design & Development: Designed and developed custom websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, ensuring alignment with client branding and objectives.
Database Management: Implemented and managed back-end data structures using MySQL to support administrative systems.
End-to-End Deployment: Managed full deployment processes, including domain configuration and server uploads via FileZilla (FTP).
title: Football Field Booking and Exercise Services Purchase Management System
technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Prisma ORM, MySQL
features: Online football field booking by date and time
Exercise service purchasing with selectable usage dates
Admin dashboard for managing and reviewing bookings
About: Logical and adaptable Full-stack Developer with a Bachelor's in Computer Engineering (GPA 3.35). Experienced in bridging hardware and software solutions with expertise in React and Laravel. Currently working as Programmer R&D at Chaiyo Pipe & Fitting, committed to mastering the Microsoft Stack to deliver high-quality support for business operations.
